import io
import string
import list

fn solve(_ nums: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Option<String>
  let n = nums.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n
      match nums.get(i)
      when Some(a)
        match nums.get(j)
        when Some(b)
          if a + b == t
            return Some("found=#{i},#{j}")
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  None
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  let tn = tokens.len()
  while k < tn
    match tokens.get(k)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  match solve(nums, target)
  when Some(msg)
    println(msg)
  when None
    println("none")
  end
end
